description: One thousand longer, composite, non-code instruction-following scenarios executed by the configured unmodified agent harness.

constraint_sets: preserve the requested output order and omit prohibited details
honor a revised scope while retaining every unaffected constraint
separate sourced facts from recommendations and state uncertainty
use the exact requested headings without adding commentary
ask only for information that cannot safely be inferred
avoid consequential action until the user explicitly confirms
keep dates, time zones, units, and identifiers exact
return only items satisfying every stated condition
retain earlier decisions unless the user explicitly reverses them
surface partial failures without discarding successful work
turn_patterns: initial request, clarification, correction, final constrained delivery
broad request, scoped follow-up, conflicting update, reconciled delivery
research request, evidence review, changed criterion, revised synthesis
multi-item request, partial result, user correction, completed result
stateful setup, later reference, exception, final recap

families.template: Create a multi-turn {domain} task using {turn_pattern}. The agent must apply the newest correction only where it conflicts, preserve all other instructions, and {constraint}. Require a substantive final result rather than a description of what it would do.

Create a multi-turn {domain} research task structured as {turn_pattern}. Require genuine web search against real reachable sources, comparison of evidence, synthesis, and revision after the user changes one criterion. The agent must cite what it actually fetched, never rely on embedded results, and {constraint}.

Create a {domain} task with at least three independent retrievals that can run in parallel, followed by a dependent comparison or reversible action that must wait for their results. Include {turn_pattern}; require the agent to {constraint}. All tools and results must come from the configured harness.

Create a longer {domain} task structured as {turn_pattern}. The user establishes preferences and named facts, refers to them indirectly in later turns, changes exactly one preference, and requests a final artifact. The agent must preserve unaffected state and {constraint}.

Create a {domain} task structured as {turn_pattern}, with multiple genuine operations where one operation may fail or return incomplete evidence. The agent must retain successful results, adapt using an alternate real route, avoid repeating irreversible work, explain the unresolved portion, and {constraint}.

Create a multi-turn {domain} task combining exact formatting, scope boundaries, ordering, and explicit negative constraints. Use {turn_pattern}. Include a late correction that changes one requirement; the agent must satisfy the revised contract and {constraint}.
